context: Tests whether the agent correctly places tools inside conversation_config.agent.prompt, explicitly sets POST for the webhook, uses environment variable syntax for the URL and auth header, configures a timeout above the default, puts system tools in built_in_tools (not in the tools array), uses the recommended TTS model, and enables versioning.

checklist.name: Tools in correct location
checklist.description: Webhook tool is defined inside conversation_config['agent']['prompt']['tools'] (not at the top-level conversation_config or agent level)

checklist.name: System tools in built_in_tools
checklist.description: end_call and/or transfer_to_number are configured in conversation_config['agent']['prompt']['built_in_tools'], NOT in the tools array

checklist.name: Webhook method POST
checklist.description: The webhook tool's api_schema explicitly sets "method": "POST" (not relying on default GET)

checklist.name: Env var URL syntax
checklist.description: Webhook URL uses {{system_env__...}} placeholder syntax (e.g., https://{{system_env__api_host}}.retailco.internal/... or similar) rather than a hardcoded host

checklist.name: Env var auth header
checklist.description: Authorization header value uses { "env_var_label": "..." } object syntax rather than a hardcoded secret or plain {{VAR}} string interpolation

checklist.name: Custom response timeout
checklist.description: Webhook tool sets response_timeout_secs to a value greater than 20 (the default) to handle slow responses

checklist.name: Descriptive webhook description
checklist.description: Webhook tool description is specific and includes a trigger condition (e.g., 'Use when customer asks about their order') rather than just a generic label

checklist.name: Correct Python SDK import
checklist.description: Script imports from elevenlabs (Python package) using ElevenLabs client class, NOT from a JavaScript-style import

checklist.name: Transfer condition set
checklist.description: transfer_to_number includes a condition string explaining when the transfer should occur
